revision.comment: Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cleanup here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{#ifexpr:{{#expr:{{#iferror:{{#time:U|{{{date}}}}}|2000000000}}>=1341100800}}*{{#if:{{{reason|x [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]}}}|0|1}}*{{#ifeq:{{{nocat}}}|true|0|1}} |{{error|1=You must add a {{para|reason}} parameter to this Cleanup template – replace it with {{Cleanup|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1|}}}{{!}}|}}{{#if:{{{date|}}}|date={{{date|}}}{{!}}}}reason=}}, or remove the Cleanup template.
}}{{Category handler |nocat = {{{nocat|}}} |main = {{DMC|Cleanup tagged articles without a reason field|from|{{{date|}}}}} }} |{{main other |{{ambox | name = Cleanup | subst = {{subst:substcheck}} | type = style | class = ambox-Cleanup | small = {{{small|}}} | sect = {{{1|}}} | issue = may '''require [[Wikipedia:cleanup|cleanup]]''' to meet Wikipedia's [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style|quality standards]]. {{#if:{{{reason|}}} |The specific problem is: '''{{Terminate sentence|{{{reason}}}}}''' }} | talk = {{{talk|{{{talksection|}}}}}} | fix = {{#if:{{{reason|}}}| |No [[Template:Cleanup/doc|cleanup reason]] has been specified. }} Please help [[Special:EditPage/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|improve this {{{1|{{SUBJECTSPACE formatted}}}}}]] if you can. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles needing cleanup | all = All pages needing cleanup | cat2 = Cleanup tagged articles with{{#if:{{{reason|}}}||out}} a reason field }} |{{mbox | demospace = {{{demospace|}}} | type = style | text = This {{{1|{{SUBJECTSPACE formatted}}}}} '''may require [[Wikipedia:cleanup|cleanup]] to meet Wikipedia's [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style|quality standards]]'''. {{#if:{{{reason|}}} |The specific problem is: '''{{Terminate sentence|{{{reason}}}}}''' |No [[Template:Cleanup/doc|cleanup reason]] has been specified. }} Please help [[Special:EditPage/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|improve this {{{1|{{SUBJECTSPACE formatted}}}}}]] if you can{{#ifeq:{{SUBJECTSPACE}}|{{NAMESPACE}} |; the [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}{{#if:{{{talksection|}}}|#{{{talksection}}}}}|talk page]] may contain suggestions. |. }} }} | demospace = {{{demospace|main}}} }}{{Category handler |page = {{SUBJECTPAGENAME}} |nocat = {{{nocat|}}} |category = {{DMC|Wikipedia categories needing cleanup|from|{{{date|}}}}} |template = {{#ifeq:{{#titleparts:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|1}}|Template:Cleanup||{{DMC|Wikipedia templates needing cleanup|from|{{{date|}}}}}}} |other = {{DMCA|Wikipedia pages needing cleanup|from|{{{date|}}}}} }} }} }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
